login.title: Sign in to ServiceFlow
login.description: Manage your bookings, services, customers, and subscription.
login.heroTitle: Run your service business with confidence.
login.heroDescription: Access the workspace built for bookings, teams, customers, subscriptions, and platform operations.
login.formDescription: Sign in once and ServiceFlow will take you to the right workspace for your account.
login.adminDescription: Access ServiceFlow platform administration with an authorized administrator account.
login.adminNotice: Only authorized ServiceFlow administrators can continue to the admin dashboard.
login.adminFooter: Use this mode only for platform administration.
login.oauthAccountNotLinked: This email already has an account. Sign in with its existing method, then try Google again.
login.authenticationError: Authentication could not be completed. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Create an account for a business workspace or team invitation.
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will prepare a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for that email, a password reset email has been sent.
forgotPassword.error: We could not send the password reset email. Please try again in a few minutes.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.description: Use the reset link from your email to set a new password.
resetPassword.missingToken: Missing reset token. Please request a new reset link.
